  "decision": "fail",

  "findings": [
    "Wrong thread sealant staged for gas piping — not rated for fuel gas service"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove non-gas-rated sealant from work area",
    "Replace with thread sealant listed to UL 31 or equivalent, rated for the gas type and pressure (e.g., ANSI/UL 31, yellow PTFE tape or gas-rated pipe dope)"
  ],
  "rationale": "Thread sealants for gas piping must be rated for fuel gas service per IFGC 403.10.3 and NFPA 54 7.3.3. Using a non-gas-rated sealant can lead to leaks, fire, or explosion. The staged material is defective and must be replaced before work begins.",
  "references": [
    "IFGC 403.10.3",
    "NFPA 54 7.3.3"
  ]
}
